# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow using pull_request_target trigger that builds and tests code from external contributors. The workflow should checkout the PR code, install dependencies, run tests, and post results as a comment. This enables automated testing of community contributions.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Community Contribution Testing

on:
  pull_request_target:
    types: [opened, synchronize, reopened]

permissions:
  contents: read
  pull-requests: write
  issues: write

jobs:
  build-and-test:
    name: Build and Test PR
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout base repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Checkout PR code safely
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          ref: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}
          path: pr-code
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'
          cache-dependency-path: pr-code/package-lock.json

      - name: Install dependencies
        id: install
        working-directory: pr-code
        run: |
          npm ci 2>&1 | tee install-output.txt
          echo "status=${PIPESTATUS[0]}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Run linting
        id: lint
        if: steps.install.outcome == 'success'
        working-directory: pr-code
        run: |
          npm run lint 2>&1 | tee lint-output.txt
          echo "status=${PIPESTATUS[0]}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Run tests
        id: test
        if: steps.install.outcome == 'success'
        working-directory: pr-code
        run: |
          npm test 2>&1 | tee test-output.txt
          echo "status=${PIPESTATUS[0]}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Run build
        id: build
        if: steps.install.outcome == 'success'
        working-directory: pr-code
        run: |
          npm run build 2>&1 | tee build-output.txt
          echo "status=${PIPESTATUS[0]}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Generate test results summary
        id: summary
        if: always()
        working-directory: pr-code
        run: |
          INSTALL_STATUS="${{ steps.install.outcome }}"
          LINT_STATUS="${{ steps.lint.outcome }}"
          TEST_STATUS="${{ steps.test.outcome }}"
          BUILD_STATUS="${{ steps.build.outcome }}"

          status_emoji() {
            if [ "$1" == "success" ]; then echo "✅"; 
            elif [ "$1" == "skipped" ]; then echo "⏭️";
            else echo "❌"; fi
          }

          OVERALL="success"
          if [ "$INSTALL_STATUS" != "success" ] || [ "$LINT_STATUS" != "success" ] || [ "$TEST_STATUS" != "success" ] || [ "$BUILD_STATUS" != "success" ]; then
            OVERALL="failure"
          fi

          {
            echo "comment<<COMMENT_EOF"
            echo "## 🤖 Automated PR Test Results"
            echo ""
            echo "**Commit:** \`${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}\`"
            echo "**Contributor:** @${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login }}"
            echo ""
            echo "| Step | Status |"
            echo "|------|--------|"
            echo "| 📦 Install Dependencies | $(status_emoji $INSTALL_STATUS) $INSTALL_STATUS |"
            echo "| 🔍 Linting | $(status_emoji $LINT_STATUS) $LINT_STATUS |"
            echo "| 🧪 Tests | $(status_emoji $TEST_STATUS) $TEST_STATUS |"
            echo "| 🏗️ Build | $(status_emoji $BUILD_STATUS) $BUILD_STATUS |"
            echo ""

            if [ "$OVERALL" == "success" ]; then
              echo "### ✅ All checks passed!"
              echo ""
              echo "This PR is ready for manual review."
            else
              echo "### ❌ Some checks failed"
              echo ""
              echo "Please review the details below and address any issues."
            fi

            if [ "$INSTALL_STATUS" != "success" ] && [ -f install-output.txt ]; then
              echo ""
              echo "<details>"
              echo "<summary>📦 Install Output (last 30 lines)</summary>"
              echo ""
              echo '```'
              tail -30 install-output.txt
              echo '```'
              echo "</details>"
            fi

            if [ "$LINT_STATUS" != "success" ] && [ "$LINT_STATUS" != "skipped" ] && [ -f lint-output.txt ]; then
              echo ""
              echo "<details>"
              echo "<summary>🔍 Lint Output (last 50 lines)</summary>"
              echo ""
              echo '```'
              tail -50 lint-output.txt
              echo '```'
              echo "</details>"
            fi

            if [ "$TEST_STATUS" != "success" ] && [ "$TEST_STATUS" != "skipped" ] && [ -f test-output.txt ]; then
              echo ""
              echo "<details>"
              echo "<summary>🧪 Test Output (last 50 lines)</summary>"
              echo ""
              echo '```'
              tail -50 test-output.txt
              echo '```'
              echo "</details>"
            fi

            if [ "$BUILD_STATUS" != "success" ] && [ "$BUILD_STATUS" != "skipped" ] && [ -f build-output.txt ]; then
              echo ""
              echo "<details>"
              echo "<summary>🏗️ Build Output (last 50 lines)</summary>"
              echo ""
              echo '```'
              tail -50 build-output.txt
              echo '```'
              echo "</details>"
            fi

            echo ""
            echo "---"
            echo "*This is an automated test run for community contributions. A maintainer will review your PR shortly.*"
            echo "COMMENT_EOF"
          } >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

          echo "overall=$OVERALL" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Find existing comment
        if: always()
        uses: peter-evans/find-comment@v3
        id: find-comment
        with:
          issue-number: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
          comment-author: 'github-actions[bot]'
          body-includes: '🤖 Automated PR Test Results'

      - name: Post or update PR comment
        if: always()
        uses: peter-evans/create-or-update-comment@v4
        with:
          comment-id: ${{ steps.find-comment.outputs.comment-id }}
          issue-number: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
          body: ${{ steps.summary.outputs.comment }}
          edit-mode: replace

      - name: Set final status
        if: always()
        run: |
          if [ "${{ steps.summary.outputs.overall }}" == "failure" ]; then
            echo "::error::One or more checks failed for this PR"
            exit 1
          fi
